series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained in accordance with OSHA standards on work related deaths, injuries and/or illnesses. Records may include: logs, reports, summaries and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five (5) calendar years from date of incident. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this Record. ; Electronic: five (5) calendar years from date of incident. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this Record
